title: Emergency and Disaster Management Program Educational Objectives
content:
Emergency and Disaster Management Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

To train qualified experts with theoretical knowledge and practical skills in the field of disaster and emergency management.

Create professional human resources capable of participating in disaster preparation, response, recovery, and mitigation activities before, during, and after disasters.

Train individuals to have knowledge in line with national and international legislation, standards, and ethical principles regarding disaster management processes.

Equip students with the managerial skills necessary for ensuring coordination and cooperation among public institutions, local governments, the private sector, and non-governmental organizations.

To gain analytical thinking skills by teaching strategic planning, risk analysis and crisis management approaches that will increase the resilience of society against disasters.

Provide operational competence in areas such as emergency response techniques, first aid applications, search and rescue, and evacuation.

To train researchers who can develop policy and practice recommendations supported by scientific data to reduce disaster risks.

Provide individuals with the communication and educational skills necessary to take an active role in disaster and social awareness processes.
